description: Style Note We like our clothes to make a statement. Make a clear one with this printed tokyo talkies Top. Pair it with jeans and those comfortable flip flops for a confidently casual and uber classy look. Product Details A yellow top with graphic print in the front, slightly puffed short sleeves and a round neck Material and Care 100% cotton Wash using mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
